title: NYCEM — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Emergency Management (NYCEM) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the NYCEM Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/em, the Notify NYC alerting platform (rented Everbridge; CAP RSS feed at feeds.everbridge.net), and the Ready NY / CERT preparedness programs. Includes the NYC geography spine (BOROCODE, BBL/BIN, council/community districts) and the hurricane evacuation-zone key.

BoroCode.description: NYC borough code ('BOROCODE'): 1 Manhattan, 2 Bronx, 3 Brooklyn, 4 Queens, 5 Staten Island.

EvacuationZone.description: NYC hurricane evacuation zone ('Evac_Zone'), 1 (highest risk) through 6, ordering the coastal-storm evacuation.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine shared across NYCEM datasets — the join keys back to the rest of city government.

councilDistrict.description: NYC Council district ('Council District' / 'City Council Districts').

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area name or code ('Neighborhood Tabulation Area (NTA) (2020)').

Geometry.description: GeoJSON-style geometry carried by NYCEM's geospatial datasets ('the_geom') — points for centers, polygons for evacuation zones.

NotificationCategory.description: Notify NYC / CAP alert category ('category' in the CAP RSS feed).
